pattern: (?i)\b(?:primary account number|full (?:card number|PAN)|unmasked (?:card number|PAN)|store the PAN|clear[- ]text (?:card number|PAN))\b

data: URI carrying an embedded base64 payload.
Long encoded blob — potential payload smuggling.

Email address (RFC-64 local + DNS-label domain + letter TLD). Structured per DNS label so Vectorscan keys on the @ literal prefilter (the prior wide {1,255} domain repeat fell to a 140x slower per-position scan).

pattern: (?i)\b(?:\bITAR\b|international traffic in arms regulations|\bEAR99\b|export administration regulations|export[- ]control(?:led|s)? (?:data|information|technology|jurisdiction)|deemed export|dual[- ]use (?:goods|technology|item))\b

Credential-embedded repo URL or internal package-registry host.
